title: unreleased fall 08
label: self-released
notes: Closes the 2008 archive batch. Folder contains a single track — "04 vital signs.m4a" (2.65 MB, file mtime 2013-02-19) — with no track 01–03 or 05+ present. The "04" prefix and singleton state suggest this was fragmentary / leftover material from a larger lost or deleted session, preserved as a representative slice rather than as a complete release. Distinct from the adjacent `pulse stuff fall 08` folder (which is dated to the same period but holds 10 tracks across both M4A and MP3).
body:
Single-file remnant of a fall 2008 session. With Session 9's
`alphabets-timesmileniceface-spring-summer-08` and this entry, every named
2008 archive folder is now vaulted; the next archeology surface is 2007
(only `freak medicine winter 07` is currently documented from that year).

## Confirmed tracks (from archive filenames)

- 04 vital signs.m4a

## Notes

The standalone `04` numbering is unusual in this period. Comparable singleton
remnants in adjacent years should be checked — they may form a pattern of
"only the take Colin liked from a multi-track session was kept under its own
folder." If a `_Documentation/Music/alphabets/` sweep surfaces other
single-file folders with a high track number, they likely belong to the same
class.
